ucs.title: [LLM] UNC3886 Linux rootkit (REPTILE / MEDUSA) install via /etc/ld.so.preload hook
ucs.description: Hunts for writes to /etc/ld.so.preload (or files dropped under /etc/ld.so.preload.d/) by anything other than the OS package manager. Mandiant has tied this exact LD_PRELOAD persistence primitive to UNC3886's REPTILE and MEDUSA userland rootkits, deployed onto Linux guest VMs after the actor pivots from compromised vCenter / Fortinet appliances. Combined with a non-package-manager parent, this is one of the highest-fidelity signals of UNC3886 post-exploitation on a Linux estate.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_hash) as file_hash values(Filesystem.process_id) as proc_id from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="/etc/ld.so.preload" OR Filesystem.file_path="/etc/ld.so.preload.d/*") AND Filesystem.action IN ("created","modified","write","renamed") AND NOT Filesystem.process_name IN ("dpkg","apt","apt-get","yum","dnf","rpm","ldconfig","zypper","pacman") by host Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.process Filesystem.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | join type=outer host process_name [| tstats summariesonly=t values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_process_name values(Processes.process) as process_full from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes by host Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | table firstTime lastTime host dest file_path file_name file_hash process_name process parent_process_name user
ucs.kql:
// UNC3886 (Mandiant) — REPTILE / MEDUSA rootkit persistence via dynamic linker preload hook
let _allowed_writers = dynamic(["dpkg","apt","apt-get","yum","dnf","rpm","ldconfig","zypper","pacman","unattended-upgrade"]);
let _system_paths   = dynamic([@"/usr/bin/",@"/usr/sbin/",@"/bin/",@"/sbin/"]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where FolderPath startswith "/etc/"                       // narrow before substring match
| where (FolderPath == "/etc/" and FileName =~ "ld.so.preload")
     or FolderPath startswith "/etc/ld.so.preload.d/"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_allowed_writers)
| extend NotFromPkgMgrPath = not(InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (_system_paths))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, ActionType, FolderPath, FileName,
          SHA256,
          Writer  = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          WriterCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          WriterPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          WriterAcct = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          WriterParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          NotFromPkgMgrPath
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// UNC3886 (Mandiant) — REPTILE / MEDUSA rootkit persistence via dynamic linker preload hook
let _allowed_writers = dynamic(["dpkg","apt","apt-get","yum","dnf","rpm","ldconfig","zypper","pacman","unattended-upgrade"]);
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where TargetFilePath startswith "/etc/"
| where (TargetFilePath == "/etc/ld.so.preload")
     or TargetFilePath startswith "/etc/ld.so.preload.d/"
| where ActingProcessName !in~ (_allowed_writers)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, EventType, TargetFilePath, TargetFileName,
          TargetFileSHA256,
          Writer = ActingProcessName,
          WriterCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine,
          WriterUser = ActorUsername
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: UNC3886 LD_PRELOAD Rootkit Persistence (REPTILE/MEDUSA)
id: 6f3d3e1c-5b8f-4f0a-9a45-unc3886-ldpreload
status: experimental
description: Detects writes to /etc/ld.so.preload or files placed under /etc/ld.so.preload.d/ by a process that is not a known package manager. Tied to UNC3886 deployment of the REPTILE and MEDUSA Linux rootkits onto guest VMs reached from compromised vCenter / Fortinet appliances.
references:
  - https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/uncovering-unc3886-espionage-operations
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1048/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1014
  - attack.t1554
  - attack.t1574
  - detection.threat_hunting
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection_path:
    TargetFilename|startswith:
      - '/etc/ld.so.preload.d/'
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '/etc/ld.so.preload'
  filter_pkgmgr:
    Image|endswith:
      - '/dpkg'
      - '/apt'
      - '/apt-get'
      - '/yum'
      - '/dnf'
      - '/rpm'
      - '/ldconfig'
      - '/zypper'
      - '/pacman'
      - '/unattended-upgrade'
  condition: selection_path and not filter_pkgmgr
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - TargetFilename
  - User
  - ParentImage
falsepositives:
  - Custom in-house performance/security shims deployed via configuration management (Ansible/Salt/Puppet) — should be allowlisted by writer path or hash.
level: high
ucs.rationale: REPTILE and MEDUSA are the two Linux userland rootkits Mandiant attributes specifically to UNC3886 after vCenter/ESXi compromise. Both rely on the LD_PRELOAD primitive — either dropping a malicious .so referenced from /etc/ld.so.preload or chaining one in /etc/ld.so.preload.d/. Writes to those paths are vanishingly rare on a healthy Linux estate, and the package-manager exclusion strips the only r
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] UNC3886 ESXi/Linux rc.local persistence implant after SSH lateral movement from vCenter
ucs.description: Hunts modifications to /etc/rc.local, /etc/rc.local.d/local.sh, /etc/init.d/* and systemd unit files where the writer is a shell child of sshd (i.e. an interactive SSH session installing persistence). Mandiant documented UNC3886 backdooring exactly /etc/rc.local.d/local.sh on ESXi hosts to launch VIRTUALPITA / VIRTUALGATE at boot, after pivoting via SSH from a compromised vCenter. The sshd→bash→write-to-rc-local chain is the actor's signature install step.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_hash) as file_hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="/etc/rc.local" OR Filesystem.file_path="/etc/rc.local.d/*" OR Filesystem.file_path="/etc/init.d/*" OR Filesystem.file_path="/etc/systemd/system/*" OR Filesystem.file_path="/usr/local/etc/rc.d/*") AND Filesystem.action IN ("created","modified","write","renamed") AND Filesystem.process_name IN ("bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl","vi","vim","nano","sed","tee","cp","mv","scp","sftp-server") by host Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.process Filesystem.process_id Filesystem.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename process_id as fs_pid | join type=inner host fs_pid [| tstats summariesonly=t values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_process_name values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_process_cmd values(Processes.process) as full_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="sshd" by host Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_id as fs_pid] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | table firstTime lastTime host dest file_path file_name file_hash process_name full_cmd parent_process_name user
ucs.kql:
// UNC3886 (Mandiant) — VIRTUALPITA / VIRTUALGATE rc.local persistence after SSH pivot from vCenter
let _persist_paths = dynamic([
  "/etc/rc.local",
  "/etc/rc.local.d/",
  "/etc/init.d/",
  "/etc/systemd/system/",
  "/usr/local/etc/rc.d/"
]);
let _shells = dynamic(["bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl","vi","vim","nano","sed","tee","cp","mv","scp","sftp-server"]);
// Writers that are children of sshd within the past 7d
let _ssh_session_pids = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "sshd"
    | where FileName in~ (_shells)
    | project DeviceId, ShellPid = ProcessId, ShellTime = Timestamp,
              ShellAcct = AccountName, RemoteParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
              ShellCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where FolderPath has_any (_persist_paths) or FileName =~ "local.sh"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_shells)
| join kind=inner _ssh_session_pids on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId
        and $left.InitiatingProcessId == $right.ShellPid
| where Timestamp between (ShellTime .. ShellTime + 1h)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, ActionType, SHA256,
          Writer = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          WriterCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          WriterAcct = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          ShellTime, ShellCmd, ShellAcct
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// UNC3886 (Mandiant) — VIRTUALPITA / VIRTUALGATE rc.local persistence after SSH pivot from vCenter
let _persist_paths = dynamic([
  "/etc/rc.local",
  "/etc/rc.local.d/",
  "/etc/init.d/",
  "/etc/systemd/system/",
  "/usr/local/etc/rc.d/"
]);
let _shells = dynamic(["bash","sh","dash","ash","zsh","python","python3","perl","vi","vim","nano","sed","tee","cp","mv","scp","sftp-server"]);
let _ssh_shell_pids = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where ParentProcessName =~ "sshd"
    | where ActingProcessName in~ (_shells)
    | project DvcHostname, ShellPid = ActingProcessId, ShellTime = TimeGenerated,
              ShellUser = ActorUsername, ShellCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where TargetFilePath has_any (_persist_paths) or TargetFileName =~ "local.sh"
| where ActingProcessName in~ (_shells)
| join kind=inner _ssh_shell_pids on $left.DvcHostname == $right.DvcHostname
        and $left.ActingProcessId == $right.ShellPid
| where TimeGenerated between (ShellTime .. ShellTime + 1h)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFilePath, TargetFileName, EventType, TargetFileSHA256,
          Writer = ActingProcessName, WriterCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine,
          ShellTime, ShellCmd, ShellUser
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: UNC3886 specifically — not random APTs — chains SSH-from-vCenter into ESXi/Linux rc.local backdooring to autostart VIRTUALPITA and VIRTUALGATE on hypervisor boot. Mandiant's named writeups call out /etc/rc.local.d/local.sh as the implant location. Plenty of detections look at rc.local writes; few require the writer to be a sshd child within the same hour. That sshd→shell→persistence-file chain is
